quicksight.analysis.pivottablevisual.Cfn:
A pivot table.

For more information, see [Using pivot tables](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/pivot-table.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.pivottablevisual.Act.Description: The list of custom actions that are configured for a visual.

quicksight.analysis.pivottablevisual.Cha.Description: The configuration settings of the visual.

quicksight.analysis.pivottablevisual.Sub.Description: The subtitle that is displayed on the visual.

quicksight.analysis.pivottablevisual.Tit.Description: The title that is displayed on the visual.

quicksight.analysis.pivottablevisual.Vis.Description: The unique identifier of a visual. This identifier must be unique within the context of a dashboard, template, or analysis. Two dashboards, analyses, or templates can have visuals with the same identifiers..
